Document:
# Rule 1 — Be Respectful
Treat all players with basic respect at all times, including between rounds.
The following are not tolerated: - Harassment or targeted behavior toward specific players - Excessive hostility or toxicity in OOC, LOOC, or ahelp
This rule applies to all chat channels, including dead chat and OOC.
Violations of this rule may result in an immediate ban depending on severity.
